title: dryas octopetala var. integrifolia
intro: Dryas octopetala var. integrifolia, also known as mountain avens, is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of mountain avens include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, making it a popular remedy for skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Mountain avens can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of applications.
